title: Crude oil gains as OPEC struggles to raise output
section_path: Crude oil gains as OPEC struggles to raise output
section_path_text: Crude oil gains as OPEC struggles to raise output
summary:
Main
By Daniel Hynes
A gloomy economic backdrop weighed on sentiment across markets. But supply side issues in energy markets helped keep them afloat. Crude oil edged higher as the market fretted about supply.
